Robert Whitaker will be undersized at light heavyweight despite moving up in weight.
items.quote: he's still going to be undersized potentially in this fight

items.claim: Robert Whitaker is coming off a layoff of nearly 12 months.
items.quote: his last fight was in July of 2025, so this fight will almost be just shy of 12 months when it kicks off.

items.claim: Robert Whitaker will possess a speed advantage over Nikita Krillov.
items.quote: he'll have more speed than Krillov I believe
